age_range.evidence: In this cross‑sectional study, 12–22 years old adolescents and young adults... were studied

countries.evidence: The study was conducted among Iranian adolescents and young adults drawn from all regions in Iran.

fieldwork_year.evidence: A cross-sectional study was conducted from September 5, 2021, to October 2, 2021.

gender_split.evidence: Finally, 970 subjects (44.2% girls and 55.8% boys) were included in the analysis.

sample_size.evidence: Finally, 970 subjects (44.2% girls and 55.8% boys) were included in the analysis.
